name: stock-opportunity-lab
description: AkShare-powered A-share opportunity screening, buy planning, and backtesting web app.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.setup: python3 -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e "backend[test]" && npm install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
